title: ASR Outdoor 11 Inch Heavy Duty Single Riffle Gold Pans Made in USA, Pink
description:
The ASR Outdoor heavy duty gold pan is designed and manufactured in the USA and features: 11 inch diameter, 5.5 inch base, lightweight design (0.36lbs), molded top edges for a comfortable grip, three large riffles, smooth and rough side walls, tough ABS plastic material content, are buoyant in water and importantly, rust resistant.

ASR Outdoor 11 Inch Heavy Duty Single Riffle Gold Pans Made in USA, Pink

The ASR Outdoor heavy duty gold pan is designed and manufactured in the USA and features: 11 inch diameter, 5.5 inch base, lightweight design (0.36lbs), molded top edges for a comfortable grip, three large riffles, smooth and rough side walls, tough ABS plastic material content, are buoyant in water and importantly, rust resistant.

Not too big, not to small, the ASR Outdoor 11 inch gold pans are ideal for field testing, cleaning up concentrates or working through small to medium deposits. Suitable for all levels of gold panning, these gold pans feature three large riffles that can get through heavy black sand deposits; and as mentioned above, smooth and rough textured side walls for finishing concentrates, allowing for the efficient panning of materials, all in one convenient gold pan.

Key Features

  • MADE IN USA: Gold pans designed and manufactured in USA; they feature an 11 inch diameter and 5.5 inch base with molded top edges allow for easy handling and comfortable grip
  • SINGLE RIFFLE DESIGN: Gold pans feature three heavy duty single riffles for panning and capturing gold; choose from three high visibility colors, green, pink or black
  • SMOOTH & ROUGH SIDE WALLS: These gold pans also feature both rough wall and smooth wall sections for working through and finishing finer concentrates
  • DURABLE MATERIAL: Innovative and tough ABS plastic material means gold pans will stand up to lots of wear and tear in the field; rust resistant, buoyant and lightweight
  • SPECIFICATIONS: 11 x 2.75 inches; Weight: 0.36lbs; Colors: Pink, Black or Green

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO-11INSRUSAPK
  • UPC: 810131776602
  • Size: 11 in

Durable and resistant to corrosion, these ASR Outdoor heavy duty plastic gold pans ensure longevity in the field and have little to no maintenance requirements. Lightweight design allows for longer use and less fatigue when gold panning. The 5.5 inch base and two wall types allow for maximum control when gold panning, especially for material that is screened and ready for finishing.

The ultimate and non negotiable tool for any gold prospector is the gold pan: look no further than ASR Outdoors Made in USA single riffle gold pans, designed for all skill levels. Good luck!

Available in three high visibility colors: pink, green or black.
